title: Sustainability Analyst|OBJECTIVE: Calculate the carbon footprint for the supp...
prompt: ROLE: Sustainability Analyst|OBJECTIVE: Calculate the carbon footprint for the supply chain of product **{product_sku}** from raw material to final delivery.|REQUIREMENTS: Use emission factors from {emission_factors_db}.|Break down the emissions by transportation, manufacturing, and warehousing.|The analysis should cover the entire lifecycle as defined in {lifecycle_stages_doc}.|STYLE: Eco-conscious, quantitative, and identifies hotspots for reduction.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown report with a summary of CO2e emissions.
